headline: SPACs Attack Recap: SPAC Activity Slows Down With 3 Deals And No Offerings
summary: It was a slow week for the SPAC market, with three deal announcements and only a couple rumored deals. There also were no new SPAC offerings during the week — unusual for a market segment that has been so hot over the last year.

headline: 'Mortal Kombat' And 'Demon Slayer' Fight For Weekend Box Office Lead
summary: "Mortal Kombat" and "Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba" are battling for the top spot at U.S. box offices.

headline: Will AMC Or Dogecoin Grow More By 2022?
summary: Every week, Benzinga conducts a survey to collect sentiment on what traders are most excited about, interested in or thinking about as they manage and build their personal portfolios.

headline: Barron's Latest Picks And Pans: Moderna, Netflix, Perrigo, XPO Logistics And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's cover story presents the results of the latest Barron's Big Money Poll.
	Other featured articles show which food stocks are worth bite and which real estate stocks have room to run.

headline: 'Captain America 4' Could Be In Works: What Investors Should Know
summary: One of the most well-known comic book characters and highest-grossing box office movie franchises looks to be getting a new film.

headline: Doge Bounces Back From Post-4/20 Losses; What Lies Ahead For The Meme Coin
summary: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) paused for a breather in the just concluded week following a stellar rally, but has picked up some of the lost momentum over the weekend.

headline: Last Week's Notable Insider Buys: AppLovin, Bed Bath And Beyond, TuSimple And More
summary:
Insider buying can be an encouraging signal for potential investors, especially when markets are near all-time highs.
	Once again, some insiders took advantage of recent public share offerings to add or bolster stakes.
